query:
SELECT t.id, t.name, t.status, COUNT(cu.id) as userCount, GROUP_CONCAT(cu.email ORDER BY cu.id SEPARATOR ', ') as emails
FROM tenants t
LEFT JOIN crm_users cu ON cu.tenantId = t.id
GROUP BY t.id, t.name, t.status
ORDER BY t.id;

GROUP BY t.id, t.name, t.status
ORDER BY t.id;
